title: Editor auto-promotion hook with dirty event bus
purpose: Automatically promotes preview tabs to permanent status when they are marked as dirty, using a global event bus to track changes.
module_context: Exports a global event bus for editor dirty state and utility functions to report and handle dirty events. Defines a React hook that subscribes to these events and promotes preview tabs.

steps.content: Notify all subscribed listeners about the dirty tab.
Add the provided listener function to the set of subscribers.
Return a cleanup function that removes the listener from subscribers.
Emit a dirty event for the specified tab ID.
Set up a subscription to the editor dirty event bus.
Track promoted tab IDs to prevent duplicate promotions.
When a dirty event is received, check if the tab is a preview tab.
IF the tab is a preview tab, promote it to permanent status.
Mark the tab as promoted to avoid reprocessing.
Return a cleanup function to unsubscribe from the event bus on unmount.
